arts.ttl: Who is Mergim Berisha? Hoffenheim striker profiled as Leeds United 'eye' transfer raid
arts.sum: Leeds United links with Hoffenheim striker Mergim Berisha have re-emerged amid Patrick Bamford's injury setback. After signing a four-year deal, Berisha failed to net in his first seven Hoffenheim matches before then suffering an ACL tear in early November 2023.

arts.ttl: Leeds United injury list and return dates for Harrogate Town and Sheffield Wednesday tests
arts.sum: Farke said at his pre-match press conference that Struijk has resumed team training. Farke said Firpo, whose contract expires at the end of the season, would be out of action for four to six weeks.

arts.ttl: Hopeful transfer audition awaits today for Leeds United’s talented duo
arts.sum: Leeds United take on League Two club Harrogate Town in the FA Cup Third Round this evening, and with that, there ought to be some rotation from Daniel Farke to allow opportunities for his fringe players. In particular, James Debayo at centre-back and Charlie Crew in midfield both featured away at Harrogate in pre-season, impressing in the process too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Harrogate Town with quintet ruled out of FA Cup test
arts.sum: Leeds United head into today's clash with Harrogate Town missing a number of players due to injury. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Injured Leeds United star sends message after returning to training
arts.sum: Ilia Gruev has shared his delight at returning to Leeds United training this week after a three-month injury absence following knee surgery. A number of teammates reacted to his post in the comments, such as Pascal Struijk, who wrote: “He’s back." Struijk himself only managed to train for the first time on Thursday after missing the clash with Hull City due to an ankle injury.

arts.ttl: Leeds United should only sign players in transfer window on one condition
arts.sum: Danny Mills believes it will be "difficult" for his former club Leeds United to bring in new players to upgrade their starting XI in the January transfer window. Speaking ahead of the Whites' FA Cup third round clash with Harrogate Town, the former England international said: “I think Leeds have got more than enough players as it is.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton gives Leeds United v Harrogate Town prediction
arts.sum: BBC pundit Chris Sutton has now issued his predictions for this weekend’s round of FA Cup ties, including Leeds’ home clash against Harrogate. Leeds United are in FA Cup action this weekend at a packed-out Elland Road, as they prepare to take on Harrogate Town in the Third Round.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke suggests imminent Leeds United exit discussions after “open and honest” update
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Joe Gelhardt has been subject to strong interest from Championship clubs and Hull City loan talks, and it was a topic that Daniel Farke has since discussed. Hull City in talks with Leeds over Joe Gelhardt loan

arts.ttl: Leeds United line up for Harrogate with Daniel Farke set to ring the changes
arts.sum: "We will rotate a bit more than for a league game but we want to go through," stressed United manager Daniel Farke. Predicted United XI for Harrogate (4-2-3-1): Darlow; Byram, Rodon, Ampadu, Schmidt; Guilavogui, Rothwell; Gnonto, Aaronson, Ramazani; Joseph.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick responds to Emmanuel Latte Lath exit talk amid Leeds United transfer link
arts.sum: Michael Carrick refused to rule out the possibility of Emmanuel Latte Lath leaving Middlesbrough this month amid links to Leeds United. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
